Trim or exit on mechanical fitness; watch for any Senate scheduling news as a re-entry trigger.

2024-07-19.thesis: MSCI India Index rebalancing in August forces index buying
2024-07-19.assessment: The August MSCI India Index rebalancing remains 2-3 weeks out — still a concrete, scheduled catalyst. However, this marks the 7th consecutive week with zero fresh press coverage of the HDB/MSCI India inflow thesis. Silence near the event window is notable; if this were widely tracked, press would be building coverage now. Per silence decay, conviction steps down again: this week's news (hedge fund picks for CRH, LIN) is entirely unrelated. The thesis is live but weakened by prolonged neglect. Coverage pick-up in the next 1-2 weeks would be needed to restore conviction; continued silence into the actual rebalancing would suggest the known inflow is already priced into HDB's run since entry.
2024-07-19.exit_advice: The catalyst is real and approaching, but repeated silence suggests the market has already absorbed the expected $5.2B inflow rather than waiting to front-run it upon publication. Watch for any renewed MSCI/HDB coverage next week; if it arrives and the trade has NOT already moved, the edge may still be live. If silence extends through rebalancing week with no coverage and no pre-event move, consider exiting into the event itself as the final forced buyers give the last liquidity window.

2024-08-09.thesis: MSCI India Index rebalancing in August forces index buying
2024-08-09.exit_case: 10 straight weeks of zero coverage on the known $5.2B HDB inflow confirms the market fully priced the August rebalancing well before arrival.
2024-08-09.assessment: The MSCI India August rebalancing is now imminent (effective date ~Aug 27-30), and we've had 10 consecutive weeks of zero press coverage of the HDB/MSCI inflow thesis since Macquarie's original report. This week's news is only broad Indian market rallies (Sensex up) with no mention of the MSCI rebalancing or HDB-specific inflow dynamics. The prolonged silence as the event approaches strongly indicates the $5.2B inflow expectation was absorbed into HDB's price long ago. The catalyst is still technically pending but the edge is effectively gone — price discovery on a known scheduled technical event typically front-runs well before execution. Conviction is at floor level after continuous silence decay. Vehicles remain HDB (direct $5.2B inflow target) and INDA (broader India ETF that captures the same rebalancing flows) but both are now fitness-competed out.
2024-08-09.exit_advice: Exit. 10 weeks of total silence on a known $5.2B inflow as the event arrives strongly signals full price absorption. The technical edge that justified entry in May is spent. If still holding, use the remaining 2-3 weeks before execution to liquidate.

2024-08-30.thesis: WHO invites mpox diagnostic manufacturers to emergency review
2024-08-30.exit_case: Invitation is procedural; review may yield no binding procurement orders or approvals.
2024-08-30.assessment: First week of a fresh WHO-level event. The invitation to emergency review signals urgent unmet demand for mpox diagnostics amid the 2024 clade Ib outbreak spreading from Africa. The review itself (and any resulting emergency-use listings, procurement mandates, or accelerated approvals) is the concrete pending catalyst — not yet held. ABT (Alinity mpox assay), QDEL (Sofia rapid platform pivots), and RHHBY (cobas mpox PCR) are all established diagnostics players WHO would tap. Coverage is still targeted to the health/biotech niche, not mainstream-saturated.
2024-08-30.exit_advice: The WHO invitation is the triggering step; the emergency review and its outcomes (potential EUL, bulk procurement signals) are concrete scheduled next steps. Hold through the review cycle; exit only if the review concludes with no actionable policy/order outcome, or if the outbreak itself subsides without further WHO escalation.

The thesis remains live with a concrete pending catalyst (the review and its outcomes) but requires fresh coverage to regain momentum.

If silence persists another 1–2 weeks with no milestone updates, conviction fades toward cull territory.

2024-09-13.assessment: Another week with no fresh coverage on mpox diagnostics trend. Silence decay continues, but catalyst (WHO emergency review) remains pending with no resolution or reversal.
2024-09-13.exit_advice: Hold until emergency review outcomes; monitor for WHO review scheduling, outbreak containment, or fresh diagnostic demand signals.
